gist.headline: Extra, extra!
gist.blurb: The daily news has been printed and pinned to the front page.
gist.summary: Automated update to the README's latest news section.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page fresh with the latest community updates.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a newsboy, holding a freshly printed newspaper to represent the README news update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, holding a freshly printed newspaper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'EXTRA'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
